bulkNormalization.yOffset: GLB walkable-surface sample at fight lane, preferring non-water/non-sky materials; bounds fallback when no surface is found
bulkNormalization.safetyClamp: Rejected non-pass model Y values outside [-12, 0] and replaced them with bounds fallback.

scaleReview.method: Compare GLB X/Z footprint against Karakura reference after UI spot-check; reduce only oversized source footprints, leave normalized 18-unit stages at scale 8.
